payload.human_next_step: answer human input evolve-reentry-routing-gap: Guidance engine does not route 'new product demand in phase 6-evolve' to evolve-project workflow. When a user in evolve says 'I want to add feature X', guide --question classifies it as builder-flow/quality-flow and routes to guideline-audit or test-strategy, instead of evolve-project (which per workflow-evolve-project.md step 2+4 should classify the change and transition back to the earliest safe phase, usually 1-discovery). This breaks the evolve-reentry design: evolve + new intent should re-run the flow from phase 1 with the new demand. Fix: guidance-engine classification must recognize 'new feature/demand intent while phase==6-evolve' as an evolve-project trigger, not a builder/quality flow. Dogfooded during v2 evolution work 2026-06-22.
